mapper.select: select count(memb_id) from BNC_MEMBER where memb_id=#{memb_id}
mapper.insert: insert into BNC_MEMBER(memb_id, memb_kind, memb_email, memb_rdate, memb_auth_flag, memb_ip) values(#{memb_id}, #{memb_kind}, #{memb_email}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss'), 'N', #{memb_ip})
mapper.update: update BNC_MEMBER set memb_auth_flag='W' where memb_email=#{memb_email}
mapper.insert: insert into BNC_COMPANY(cmpy_biznum, cmpy_biz_doc_file_path, cmpy_memb_id, cmpy_company_name, cmpy_ci_file_path, cmpy_ceo_name, cmpy_biz_code, cmpy_biz_address, cmpy_biz_phone, cmpy_biz_email, cmpy_contents, cmpy_homepage, cmpy_rdate, cmpy_udate) values(#{cmpy_biznum}, #{cmpy_biz_doc_file_path}, #{cmpy_memb_id}, #{cmpy_company_name}, #{cmpy_ci_file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpy_ceo_name}, #{cmpy_biz_code}, #{cmpy_biz_address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpy_biz_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpy_biz_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpy_contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpy_homepage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss'))
mapper.select: select c.cmpy_ci_file_path, c.cmpy_company_name, c.cmpy_ceo_name, b.bizc_name, c.cmpy_biz_phone, c.cmpy_biz_address, c.cmpy_biz_email, c.cmpy_homepage, c.cmpy_contents from BNC_COMPANY c, bnc_biz_category b where c.cmpy_biz_code = b.bizc_code and c.cmpy_memb_id = #{cmpy_memb_id}
mapper.update: update BNC_COMPANY set cmpy_ci_file_path = #{cmpy_ci_file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_company_name = #{cmpy_company_name}, cmpy_ceo_name = #{cmpy_ceo_name}, cmpy_biz_code = #{cmpy_biz_code}, cmpy_biz_address = #{cmpy_biz_address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_biz_phone = #{cmpy_biz_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_biz_email = #{cmpy_biz_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_contents = #{cmpy_contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_homepage = #{cmpy_homepage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmpy_udate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss') where cmpy_memb_id = #{cmpy_memb_id}
mapper.select: select * from BNC_SIGN where sign_memb_id = #{sign_memb_id} order by sign_num desc
mapper.insert: insert into BNC_SIGN values(sign_seq.nextval, #{sign_file_path}, #{sign_memb_id}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHiiss'))
mapper.select: select * from BNC_SIGN where sign_num = #{sign_num} and sign_memb_id = #{sign_memb_id}
